title: Hide monday "help" button when an app view is open
excerpt:
Request is to remove the “help” button by default when a user opens a third-party view or widget. Otherwise, the button may overlap with whatever help button the app has implemented.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request is to remove the “help” button by default when a user opens a third-party view or widget. Otherwise, the button may overlap with whatever help button the app has implemented.

Even if the app moves their button up, it becomes unclear UI: to a user, both buttons seem to do the same thing.

Suggested by @dvdsmpsn.

Screenshot of overlapping buttons:

image719×526 65.8 KB

Ideal state (notice the “help” button is gone):

image720×463 107 KB

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @dipro

posts.author: Danielle-AvisiApps (Daniëlle)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also want to add that a monday automatic support bot appears above our app as well, which strongly gives the impression that you can ask the bot questions about our app (since that’s what you’re interacting with at that moment). Very frustrating, of course, and it makes it difficult for us to offer our own support tools in logical places within the app.

Screenshot 2025-04-08 at 16.44.391381×861 74.6 KB
